institution_name: National Law School of India University (NLSIU), Bangalore
academic_awards: Best Researcher, National Corporate Law Moot, 2024

internships.role_description: - Assisted in drafting of Draft Red Herring Prospectus (DRHP) for a mainboard IPO of a mid-cap manufacturing company, specifically the risk factors section and litigation disclosures chapter under Schedule VI of ICDR Regulations, 2018 - Reviewed SEBI observation letter and prepared initial response matrix flagging compliance gaps - Prepared LODR compliance checklist for the issuer covering board composition, audit committee requirements, and related party transaction disclosures required post-listing - Assisted in reviewing underwriting agreement and coordinating with merchant banker on book building timeline

- Assisted in QIP transaction for a listed NBFC - drafted sections of the placement document and reviewed institutional investor agreements - Conducted due diligence on material contracts including loan agreements and key customer contracts for IPO readiness assessment - Researched FEMA provisions applicable to FPI participation in the QIP and prepared a regulatory note on applicable RBI approvals - Assisted in preferential allotment matter - drafted board and shareholder resolutions and reviewed ICDR compliance checklist

- Assisted in review of DRHP filings submitted by merchant bankers - identified disclosure gaps against ICDR Regulations requirements - Prepared internal notes on recent amendments to SEBI LODR Regulations and their impact on listed company disclosure obligations - Attended hearings related to SEBI enforcement proceedings under the Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992
domain_terms_found: Securities and Exchange Board of India Act, 1992

publications: Disclosure Obligations under ICDR Regulations 2018: A Critical Analysis of Risk Factor Drafting Standards
FPI Investment Limits in Listed Companies: Regulatory Framework and Recent SEBI Amendments

moot_courts.name: National Corporate Law Moot Court Competition
moot_courts.topic: SEBI Takeover Code and open offer obligations

moot_courts.name: NUJS Securities Law Moot
moot_courts.topic: ICDR Regulations and mis-disclosure in DRHP
